steps.title: Set up the rate-distance relationship
steps.content: Juan's rate is 5.7 minutes per mile. For x miles, we multiply rate by distance to get total time. This is a linear function with slope 5.7.

steps.title: Verify with a test value
steps.content:
For x = 1 mile:
$$m(1) = 5.7 \times 1 = 5.7$$
This equals the given rate of 5.7 minutes per mile. That matches choice D — D is correct.
